subcodes.first_line: One must not remain content with any degree of spiritual perfections and divine bestowals, but rather must continually [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نبايد در کمالات روحانيّه و سنوحات رحمانيّه بدرجه‌ای قناعت نمود بلکه مستمرّاً
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
